case_title: DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP VS. JUAN CARLOS MANZANARES

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP AS TO DEFENDANT MANZANARES, JUAN CARLOS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-14-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-14-2014 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-14-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-14-2014 BY JUDGE PRO TEM BRAD KAPLAN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY LENIA RODRIGUEZ-LEGAL ASSISTANT/COLLECTION DEPT. JUDGE PRO TEM: BRAD KAPLAN. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MANZANARES, JUAN CARLOS $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
